svg.text: one session: insert card → authenticate → pick + run a transaction → dispense → eject → back to IDLE
built as a Command with execute()
THE MACHINERY — State pattern + two collaborators
invalid op throws — no forgotten case
the orchestrator the interviewer sees first
can't make exact amount? dispense nothing

g.text: each State only exposes its legal ops;

svg.text: ① IDLE → ② insert + authenticate (CARD_INSERTED → PIN_ENTERED) → ③ pick & PROCESS a transaction → dispense / complete → eject ⟳ IDLE · ④ State + CashDispenser + BankService

g.text: Patterns: State · Strategy · Command · two-phase dispense
ATM System — LLD (card → PIN → transaction → dispense state machine)
